name: Nordicus Partners Corp
summary: Nordicus Partners Corporation is a U.S. publicly listed business accelerator and holding company focused on Nordic life sciences companies. It acquires and accelerates preclinical biotechnology firms targeting unmet medical needs. Its portfolio includes Orocidin A/S, developing QR-01 for aggressive periodontitis, and Bio-Convert A/S, developing QR-02 for oral leukoplakia treatment. The company also holds a 4.99% interest in Mag Mile Capital, a commercial real estate mortgage banking firm.

products.name: QR-01
products.description: Proprietary mucoadhesive oral topical treatment for aggressive periodontitis developed by Orocidin A/S, currently in preclinical stage.

products.name: QR-02
products.description: Novel proprietary mucoadhesive oral topical formulation for oral leukoplakia developed by Bio-Convert A/S, preclinical stage.

products.name: QR-01
products.description: Proprietary first-of-its-kind mucoadhesive oral topical treatment for aggressive periodontitis developed by Orocidin A/S.

products.name: QR-02
products.description: Novel proprietary mucoadhesive oral topical formulation to treat and reduce dysplasia in oral leukoplakia, developed by Bio-Convert A/S.

partnerships.description: Nordicus acquired a 4.99% interest in this full-service commercial real estate mortgage banking firm headquartered in Chicago.
Company acquired a 4.99% interest in this full-service commercial real estate mortgage banking firm headquartered in Chicago.
Bio-Convert A/S received positive scientific advice from DKMA regarding QR-02, paving the way toward a First in Human trial.
